questions.q: Which everyday system is supported by government rules and services?
options: Clean water, food safety, and roads
questions.explanation: Government quietly supports water, food safety, roads, and more.

questions.q: Which federal agency screens airline passengers?
questions.explanation: The Transportation Security Administration screens travelers.
The U.S. Postal Service delivers mail nationwide.

questions.q: Which level of government runs most public schools and local roads?
questions.explanation: Schools and local roads are mainly state and local responsibilities.

questions.q: When do your constitutional rights apply?
options: Throughout daily life, whether or not you think about them
questions.explanation: Rights like speech, religion, and due process are always in force.
